home.hero_desc: Over 12 years of authentic Italian craftsmanship. Every piece handmade by master artisans from Italy.
home.col_living_desc: Classic Italian living room sofas and furniture. Solid wood frames upholstered with premium fabric and leather, designed to be both beautiful and comfortable for everyday living.
home.col_dining_desc: Handmade dining tables and chairs by Italian craftsmen. Solid hardwood with hand-carved legs, available in extendable and fixed sizes for any home.
home.col_bedroom_desc: Classic European-style bedroom furniture. Intricately carved headboards in three styles: Mellifluous Classic, Luxurious Decorated, and Contemporary.
home.col_working_desc: Classic-style desks and chairs for a premium home office. Detailed Italian craftsmanship blending European elegance with practical functionality.
home.about_desc1: LeoAngelo Co., Ltd. has been importing authentic classic Italian furniture for over 12 years. Every piece is meticulously handcrafted by master artisans from Italy.
home.about_desc2: We believe that great furniture is an investment — in your home and your quality of life. Our curated selection balances timeless European aesthetics with the needs of modern living.
home.bed_style1_desc: The perfect harmony of classical elegance. Rich carvings and warm tones create a bedroom that feels like a European palace.
home.bed_style2_desc: Opulent detailing and gold accents for those who want to make a statement. A bedroom of unrivalled grandeur.
home.bed_style3_desc: Classic proportions meet modern sensibility. Clean lines and refined craftsmanship for the discerning modern home.
home.testi1_text: The quality is extraordinary. Every detail of the living room set shows the true craftsmanship of Italian artisans. Our home has been transformed.
home.testi2_text: We've been LeoAngelo customers for 5 years. The furniture has only become more beautiful with time — a true mark of quality materials and craftsmanship.
home.testi3_text: The team guided us expertly to the right pieces for our home. The service is as refined as the furniture itself.

collections.bedroom_desc: Classic European bedroom furniture. Intricately carved headboards in three styles: Mellifluous Classic, Luxurious Decorated, and Contemporary.
collections.working_desc: Classic desks and chairs for a premium home office. Italian craftsmanship blending European elegance with practical use.
collections.lighting_desc: Lighting that makes your home a special place — warm and bright in the evening. Imported directly from Italy.
collections.ornament_desc: Explore our furniture and décor portfolio to create a beautiful home tailored to your taste, guided by our professional team.
collections.custom_desc: We provide consultation and source furniture tailored to your space and preferences.

about.hero_sub: Over 12 years of importing genuine classic Italian furniture to Thailand — handcrafted by master artisans.
about.story_heading: Born from a Passion for Italian Beauty
about.story_p1: LeoAngelo Co., Ltd. was founded on a belief that beautiful furniture should be accessible to those who truly appreciate quality. We import authentic handmade classic furniture directly from Italy.
about.story_p2: For over 12 years, we have built relationships with the finest artisan workshops in Italy, ensuring every piece that reaches our showroom meets the highest standards of craftsmanship.
about.story_p3: Our mission is simple: to bring the timeless elegance of Italian furniture into Thai homes, creating spaces that are both beautiful and enduring.
about.t1_desc: LeoAngelo was established with a vision to bring authentic Italian furniture to Thailand.
about.t2_desc: Opened our first Bangkok showroom, introducing Thai customers to genuine Italian craftsmanship.
about.t3_desc: Expanded our portfolio to include bedroom, dining and working room collections.
about.t4_desc: Celebrated 10 years serving Thailand's most discerning homes.
about.t5_desc: Continuing to grow, bringing the finest Italian furniture to homes across Thailand.
about.craft_p1: Italy has been the global centre of furniture design and craftsmanship for centuries. The artisans we partner with have inherited techniques passed down through generations.
about.craft_p2: Every piece in our collection is made by hand — from the solid wood frames to the hand-stitched upholstery. No shortcuts, no mass production.
about.cta_desc: Experience the beauty and quality of our furniture in person. Our team is ready to guide you.

contact.label: Contact Us
contact.heading: Interested in
contact.sub: Our team is ready to advise you on selecting furniture that suits your home and taste — whether for a full interior or a single piece.
contact.info_desc: LeoAngelo Co., Ltd. — Importers of authentic classic Italian handmade furniture.
contact.message_ph: Tell us about your space, style preferences, or the furniture you're interested in...
contact.success_desc: We've received your message and will get back to you within 1 business day. Thank you for your interest in LeoAngelo.

footer.desc: Importers of authentic classic Italian furniture. Handmade by master Italian craftsmen. Trusted for over 12 years.
footer.quote: Quality is remembered long after price is forgotten.
